title: Tool Design, Errors, Pagination, and Context Efficiency · Threat Case: Tool Evals
summary: Refine an MCP server whose tools are ambiguous and return too much data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext tool evals increment in an efficient tool API and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Evaluate selection, argument construction, recovery, context cost, and side-effect accuracy.
Provide filters, pagination, summaries, and stable identifiers for large result sets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
